Boltzmann constant I. $$ \left[\mathrm{M}^{-1} \mathrm{~L}^3 \mathrm{~T}^{-2}\right] $$ B. Stefan's constant II. $$ \left[\mathrm{M} \mathrm{~L}^2 \mathrm{~T}^{-1}\right] $$ C. The measured values of $m, l$ and $d$ are $97.42 \pm 0.02 \mathrm{~g}$, $8.35 \pm 0.05 \mathrm{~mm}$ and $20.20 \pm 0.02 \mathrm{~mm}$, respectively. Calculated percentage fractional error in $\rho$ is $\_\_\_\_$ . question.question_text: Consider the equation $H=\frac{x^p \epsilon^q E^r}{t^s}$ Where $H=$ magnetic field; $E=$ electric field, $\epsilon=$ permittivity, $x=$ distance, $t=$ time The values of $p, q, r$ and $s$ respectively are :
latex_blocks: \text { Match List - I with List - II. }
\\left[L^{-1} A\\right]=\\left[M^{-q+r} L^{p-3 q+r} T^{4 q-3 r-s} A^{2 q-r}\\right]
\\text { Match List - I with List - II. }
\\text { सूची - I का सूची - II के साथ मिलान करें : }
